title: MYR Report
description: Methodological Yield Report — captures compounding intelligence from OODA cycles

lineage.description: Value-add graph lineage — tracks derivation from peer MYRs. Required when this MYR was informed by or derives from a peer's report. See docs/myr-value-add-graph.md for model.

derived_from.description: Source MYR ID (maps from MC task field: myr_source). Format: {author}-{YYYYMMDD}-{NNN}

derived_from_node.description: Node ID of the source author (maps from MC task field: myr_author, normalized to node id).

derived_relationship.description: How this MYR relates to the source. Maps from MC closeout field: verification_relationship.

derived_relationship_notes.description: Context on the relationship — what changed, what was confirmed, or what contradicted.

verification.description: Operator's first-hand verification of this yield. verified_by_me must be true before a MYR influences operational decisions.

verified_by_me.description: True only if this operator personally tried and verified this yield in their own context.

verification_context.description: The specific context in which verification occurred (machine, project, date range, etc.).
